# Complete demonstration: Stitching test scripts to programs

# This test script calls mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# Standard callgraph limitation:
# - It analyzes static Go code
# - It cannot see that this test calls mcpdiff
# - It cannot connect this test to mcpdiff's main() function

# Our testcallgraph solution:
# - Parses test scripts to find "exec" commands
# - Identifies which programs are executed (mcpdiff)
# - Creates connections from test -> program's main()
# - Completes the call graph with these missing edges

# The implementation is in testcallgraph/simple_demo.go
